summary: Printify API integration complete. Created type-safe API client (printify.ts) with full coverage of catalog, products, orders, shipping, and webhook endpoints. Built product sync module (sync.ts) that fetches Printify products, maps to local types, applies 40% markup pricing, generates slugs, and builds SKU lookup maps. Extended Product/ProductVariant types with Printify fields (printifyProductId, sku, costCents, etc.). Added API routes: GET /api/shop/products, POST /api/shop/sync, POST /api/webhooks/printify. Falls back to mock products when Printify is not configured. TypeScript compiles cleanly.
